2606.11976.title: Exploration Structure in LLM Agents for Multi-File Change Localization
2606.11976.paper_summary: Software engineering tools increasingly rely on LLM based agents to localize files to change to resolve a software issue. Most AI agents explore repositories linearly, that is, visiting one directory or file per step. We postulate that this is a structural mismatch for changes that span several subsystems. We compare linear sequential exploration against non-linear, domain-scoped parallel agentic exploration. Using SWE Bench Pro as initial benchmark, we focus on ansible as an exemplar. We construct an approach for persistent-session evaluation of GitHub issues anchored at a single base commit. We compare our non-linear domain-agent file traversal system against a base LLM without direct repository access, a single agent Recursive Language Model (RLM) baseline with a persistent Python REPL and an external CLI baseline using Codex 5.5 High. Domain scoped parallel agent spawning with a small Haiku-class model achieves the highest micro F1 among Haiku class models by a large margin. Domain-agents is the second highest behind only the much larger Codex 5.5 High on our own expanded benchmark including over more recent PRs from 2025 and 2026. On the original, curated, 2020 SWE-bench Pro benchmark, a larger Sonnet plain LLM baseline attains higher micro F1 by predicting few files, leading to higher precision, but at significantly lower all gold recall. We also present three additional findings. First, documentation evolution is a latent dependency unresolved by any approach. Second, naive file system access can degrade localization driven by test-file over prediction. Lastly, forced multi-agent consultation does not measurably help and raises token cost substantially.
2606.11976.paper_summary_zh: 軟體工程工具越來越依賴基於 LLM 的代理來定位需要更改的檔案，以解決軟體問題。大多數 AI 代理以線性方式探索庫，即每一步訪問一個目錄或檔案。我們推測這對於跨越多個子系統的變更來說是一種結構不匹配。我們將線性順序探索與非線性、領域範疇的平行代理探索進行比較。以 SWE Bench Pro 作為初始基準，我們專注於 ansible 作為範例。我們構建了一種針對單一基礎提交的 GitHub 問題持續會話評估方法。我們將我們的非線性領域代理檔案遍歷系統與沒有直接庫訪問的基礎 LLM、具有持久 Python REPL 的單一代理遞歸語言模型（RLM）基準，以及使用 Codex 5.5 High 的外部 CLI 基準進行比較。領域範疇的平行代理生成使用小型 Haiku 類模型在 Haiku 類模型中實現了最高的微 F1，差距相當大。領域代理的微 F1 排名第二，僅次於我們自己擴展基準中更大規模的 Codex 5.5 High，該基準包括來自 2025 年和 2026 年的最新 PR。在原始的、策劃的 2020 SWE-bench Pro 基準中，更大的 Sonnet 普通 LLM 基準通過預測少量檔案來獲得更高的微 F1，從而導致更高的精確度，但所有金標的召回率卻顯著較低。我們還提出了三個額外的發現。首先，文檔演變是一種潛在的依賴性，任何方法都無法解決。其次，天真的檔案系統訪問可能會因測試檔案的過度預測而降低定位效果。最後，強制多代理諮詢並未顯著幫助，並且大幅提高了令牌成本。
2606.11976.author: Akeela Darryl Fattha et.al.
2606.11976.authors: Akeela Darryl Fattha, Kia Ying Chua, Lingxiao Jiang, Laura Wynter
